name: Abdul Mobasir Sarkar
title: Software Engineer
tagline: Building scalable systems, one panel at a time.
summary: Software Engineer with 3+ years of experience developing scalable web applications, backend services, and enterprise platforms using Golang, Python, TypeScript, React, Next.js, PostgreSQL, and Redis.
Experienced in building REST/GraphQL APIs, real-time applications, authentication systems, and distributed services, with hands-on experience in Docker, GitHub Actions, Nginx, and Linux.
Focused on building scalable, maintainable, and production-ready applications.
